quest.title: Escape Empty London
quest.description: Survive the deserted streets of London and trace the military radio broadcast to a safe outpost.

scene.background: An eerie, completely abandoned Westminster Bridge in London under a heavy bleak overcast sky, red double-decker bus crashed, quiet survival dread mood, detailed digital oil painting

quest.description: Locate scientific clues about the origin of the swarm while defending fortified walls and finding a vaccine.
